meta.title: Stavanger Corridor Market Atlas
meta.description: Seed graph for a Kumu-inspired actor-centric market atlas spanning Egersund to Rennesøy.
meta.corridor_description: Seed actor graph spanning the corridor from Egersund to Rennesøy with public, private, hybrid, institutional, and ecosystem actors.

profile.summary: Core public actor for the corridor and a central municipal buyer and ecosystem shaper.
profile.why_it_matters: Important both as a direct buyer and as a coordinating public actor in the region.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Important both as a direct buyer and as a coordinating public actor in the region.

profile.summary: Major public actor in the corridor with broad service and digitalization surface area.
profile.why_it_matters: Relevant as both an owner in inter-municipal structures and a potential direct buyer.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Relevant as both an owner in inter-municipal structures and a potential direct buyer.

profile.summary: Public actor with infrastructure-heavy local context and ownership links into regional utilities.
profile.why_it_matters: Smaller than Stavanger or Sandnes but strategically relevant through ownership and local growth context.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Smaller than Stavanger or Sandnes but strategically relevant through ownership and local growth context.

profile.summary: Smaller municipal actor with ownership ties into regional infrastructure entities.
profile.why_it_matters: Useful for corridor completeness and for understanding public ownership structures.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Useful for corridor completeness and for understanding public ownership structures.

profile.summary: Jæren municipality with ownership relevance in regional infrastructure and proximity to industrial and aquaculture actors.
profile.why_it_matters: Relevant more as a structural node than as a top-tier direct buyer in the seed set.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Relevant more as a structural node than as a top-tier direct buyer in the seed set.

profile.summary: Southern Jæren municipality important to corridor coverage and public ownership structures.
profile.why_it_matters: Less important as a first-wave buyer, but useful in the public-system view.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Less important as a first-wave buyer, but useful in the public-system view.

profile.summary: Jæren public actor connected to corridor infrastructure ownership and industrial context around Bryne.
profile.why_it_matters: Useful as both a place anchor and public-system node.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Useful as both a place anchor and public-system node.

profile.summary: Eastern corridor municipality with ownership relevance and regional adjacency.
profile.why_it_matters: Primarily a structural public node in the seed.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Primarily a structural public node in the seed.

profile.summary: Corridor municipality that matters mainly for boundary truth and utility ownership context.
profile.why_it_matters: Included to keep the corridor logic honest rather than Stavanger-centric.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Included to keep the corridor logic honest rather than Stavanger-centric.

profile.summary: Southern boundary municipality and local public anchor for Dalane-facing corridor coverage.
profile.why_it_matters: Important for geographic completeness and for south-corridor actor navigation.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Important for geographic completeness and for south-corridor actor navigation.

profile.summary: Regional energy and telecom group with strong digital surface area and major public ownership ties.
profile.why_it_matters: One of the most strategically important hybrid actors in the corridor.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: One of the most strategically important hybrid actors in the corridor.

profile.summary: Customer-facing Lyse unit with explicit responsibility for customer journeys and digital customer surfaces.
profile.why_it_matters: Useful seed example of when business-unit modeling is more truthful than parent-only modeling.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Useful seed example of when business-unit modeling is more truthful than parent-only modeling.

profile.summary: Inter-municipal infrastructure company for water, wastewater, and waste with multiple owner municipalities.
profile.why_it_matters: Important hybrid-like operational context even though the legal logic is public.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Important hybrid-like operational context even though the legal logic is public.

profile.summary: Major public health actor and one of the most important institutional nodes in the corridor.
profile.why_it_matters: High strategic value as both a buyer and a partner node in regional health innovation.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: High strategic value as both a buyer and a partner node in regional health innovation.

profile.summary: Regional university and one of the strongest institutional connectors in the corridor.
profile.why_it_matters: Important both as a potential buyer and as a hub connecting health, energy, and entrepreneurship.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Important both as a potential buyer and as a hub connecting health, energy, and entrepreneurship.

profile.summary: Applied research actor with strong relevance where research, technology, and public-sector collaboration meet.
profile.why_it_matters: Important as an ecosystem connector and collaboration node, with selective direct-buyer potential.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Important as an ecosystem connector and collaboration node, with selective direct-buyer potential.

profile.summary: Non-profit innovation company and early-stage commercialization actor with strong regional reach.
profile.why_it_matters: Not primarily a large direct buyer, but strategically valuable as a route-to-market and ecosystem node.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Not primarily a large direct buyer, but strategically valuable as a route-to-market and ecosystem node.

profile.summary: Health technology cluster with national reach and a base in Stavanger.
profile.why_it_matters: Valuable as a channel and a network surface rather than as a large direct buyer.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Valuable as a channel and a network surface rather than as a large direct buyer.

profile.summary: Innovation and cluster actor focused on smarter and more sustainable cities and communities.
profile.why_it_matters: Strategically useful as an ecosystem hub, especially around public/private collaboration and urban innovation.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Strategically useful as an ecosystem hub, especially around public/private collaboration and urban innovation.

profile.summary: Regional business association and convener spanning Dalane to Ryfylke.
profile.why_it_matters: Important as a visibility, access, and ecosystem sensemaking node.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Important as a visibility, access, and ecosystem sensemaking node.

profile.summary: Offshore wind industry network with a Stavanger office and strong relevance to energy-transition supply chains.
profile.why_it_matters: Useful as a channel and cluster lens for transition-oriented actors, even though its headquarters sit outside the corridor.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Useful as a channel and cluster lens for transition-oriented actors, even though its headquarters sit outside the corridor.
notes: Main office is in Haugesund; node is included for corridor relevance via Stavanger office.

profile.summary: Health innovation and co-creation arena linking academia, healthcare providers, public actors, and industry.
profile.why_it_matters: A highly informative seed node because it makes regional health-innovation relationships visible.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: A highly informative seed node because it makes regional health-innovation relationships visible.

profile.summary: Global health-technology company with headquarters in Stavanger and strong product-development depth.
profile.why_it_matters: One of the corridor’s clearest product and design-relevant private actors.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: One of the corridor’s clearest product and design-relevant private actors.

profile.summary: Fast-moving charging technology company with strong product and design surface area.
profile.why_it_matters: A good example of a growth/product-led actor that may move faster than larger incumbents.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: A good example of a growth/product-led actor that may move faster than larger incumbents.

profile.summary: Independent engineering and product-development actor in Bryne with energy-sector roots.
profile.why_it_matters: Relevant because it bridges engineering, product development, and industrial problem solving.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Relevant because it bridges engineering, product development, and industrial problem solving.

profile.summary: Global aquaculture technology company with headquarters in Klepp.
profile.why_it_matters: Strategically relevant because it sits at the intersection of industrial systems, software, and product development.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Strategically relevant because it sits at the intersection of industrial systems, software, and product development.

profile.summary: Egersund-based group company associated with AKVA group’s office network and the southern corridor edge.
profile.why_it_matters: Useful seed example of a corridor actor that is meaningful both geographically and structurally.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Useful seed example of a corridor actor that is meaningful both geographically and structurally.

profile.summary: Large energy company with a major Forus office and substantial operational complexity.
profile.why_it_matters: A structurally important enterprise account with likely need for digital, product, and workflow modernization.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: A structurally important enterprise account with likely need for digital, product, and workflow modernization.

profile.summary: Energy-services actor with Norway operations in Tananger and a strong technology and efficiency narrative.
profile.why_it_matters: Relevant where advanced operations, digital workflows, and transition-linked modernization intersect.
profile.relevant_to_olavstoppen: Relevant where advanced operations, digital workflows, and transition-linked modernization intersect.

notes: Modeled as a group-company relationship based on AKVA group office structure.

views.label: Market overview
views.description: Default actor map spanning public, private, hybrid, and ecosystem actors.

views.label: Design relevant
views.description: Actors where design relevance is high.

views.label: AI relevant
views.description: Actors with medium or high AI relevance.

views.label: Geographic corridor
views.description: Location-oriented lens with municipality structure emphasized.
